GpuSortExec: expr=[n_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuProjectExec: expr=[n_name@1 as n_name, r_name@0 as r_name]
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=15790320
      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(r_regionkey@0, n_regionkey@1)], projection=[1, 2]
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=15790320
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=15790320
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=592
GpuSortExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=136, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=128
  GpuProjectExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=136, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=128
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=136, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=128
      GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=136, estimate_input_bytes=72, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=136
        GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=36, estimate_cost=36
        GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=36, estimate_cost=36
